hypothesis: Incorporating a structured, persistent semantic memory of domain heuristics and an episodic memory of past runs into the presented multi-agent framework will increase force-field extraction IoU for non-standard parameter tables (e.g., EPM2) from 0.67 to ≥0.90 and raise simulation setup success for three-adsorbate HOA and isotherm tasks to ≥95% without reducing execution rates, when evaluated on the same benchmark suite.
